name: Cute kitty~ ;3
description:
Its a different one isn't it? I've done it...I made a new bot without having a mental breakdown from all my stress. I'm struggling bro. Life hurts. But you gotta remember...even when life is hard, you've gotta push through. (I cried myself to sleep for the past 2 weeks). I've been trying. This bot....I finally threw my sadness out the door and finally convinced myself to go to a psychiatrist. Let yall know how it goes.

Here's a perfect song to listen to with this bot.... run by collective soul

Well....I suppose i should stop talking about my issues and let you talk to the bot. Enjoy it yall....

Found the full art:
creator: moonphoria
